opening_rows.detail: The current user continuation is treated as the explicit shift that opens intraday add research.
Intraday add opens as a supervision frontier, not as an execution-facing or replay-facing branch.
Board cooling lockout, local-only rebound guard, and board revival unlock remain upstream constraints.
Intraday add does not inherit reduce execution authority or reopen reduce frozen mainline.
The first add artifact should be an intraday add supervision registry rather than an execution rule or replay lane.

interpretation: V1.34EH is the explicit frontier shift: intraday add is no longer deferred, but it only opens as a supervision frontier.
The opening is intentionally narrow so the branch can begin without inheriting reduce execution claims or bypassing board-level vetoes.
